Racing

Race With Sheffield

First finish lines to university competition.

Discover beginner-friendly races, club events and competitive opportunities.

Join the Club View Training

Race Culture

Racing is optional, but supported.

Some members join to race. Some join to train socially. Some join with no race plans and decide later. The race page should help members understand what opportunities exist and how to get involved.

Contact Us View Training
Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
